last_safe_checkpoint.description: Validated runtime, goals, and public docs for the mandatory refine-plan and analyzer-led goals workflow slice.

bootstrap.goal: Make refine -> plan mandatory in run, run-once, and daemonize, and add an analyzer expert to goals prompt generation so planner-controlled workflows start from stronger prompts.

task_sync.resume_checkpoint: Implementation and targeted validation are complete. Resume from commit preparation unless the user redirects priority.

items.text: Phase 1. Add `analyzer` to the runtime role model and examples
Phase 2. Make `refiner` and `planner` mandatory pipeline prelude stages
Phase 3. Enforce the mandatory prelude in CLI and daemon single-agent paths
Phase 4. Upgrade goals prompt generation to use requirements analysis and planner-owned workflow contracts
Phase 5. Refresh regression tests and fake CLI helpers for the new flow

next_action: Prepare the validated mandatory refine-plan and goals analyzer slice for commit and push.
notes: Resume from commit preparation unless a higher-priority runtime workflow change is requested.
run, run-once, and daemonize single-agent paths now execute a mandatory refine-plan prelude before downstream work.
Goals prompt generation now supports analyzer -> planner -> architect and emits a workflow contract that makes planner authoritative after plan.
README.md, docs/GUIDE.md, and docs/ko/GUIDE.md now describe the new runtime and goals behavior.
Validation passed for targeted role-config, pipeline-runner, goals-scheduler, CLI, daemon, and Mermaid-doc test slices.
